title: structured_prompt

goal.description: The primary task or objective the prompt is asking for.

goal_source.description: Whether the goal was explicitly stated, safely inferred from context, or is absent.

constraints.description: Explicit limitations, requirements, or rules stated by the user. Empty array when none present.

output_format.description: The expected structure or format of the output.

output_format_source.description: Whether the output_format was explicitly stated, safely inferred from context, or is absent.

noise_removed.description: Phrases or sections removed as noise, listed for transparency.

contradictions_resolved.description: Contradictions found and how each was resolved.

x-hard_rules: goal must be extracted from the original prompt, not invented.
goal_source must be 'stated' when goal text was present verbatim or near-verbatim in the original.
goal_source must be 'inferred' when goal was reconstructed from implicit context.
goal_source must be 'missing' when the goal cannot be determined — in this case StrictMode must block.
output_format_source must follow the same stated/inferred/missing logic as goal_source.
constraints must not be removed without appearing in noise_removed or contradictions_resolved.
When goal_source or output_format_source is 'missing', StrictMode must block before proceeding.
